title: Brave
lyrics: You're gonna want to go down the line I know you want to go down the line And faster, faster, faster as your eyes vibrate You say you want to go down the line, brave You say you want to go it alone, you're brave You can't be here and there at the same time Make up your mind Oh, you say you want to go down the line, you're brave Oh, you're so brave You want to go down the line, you want to really find you Don't forget to face the thing that makes you run Run away from what could be inside your manifestation of me, yeah Brave, you say you want to go down the line Brave, you say you want to be mine Brave, you say you want to go down the line Brave, you say you want to commit a crime Brave, you say you want to go down the line Brave, you say you want to be mine Too late I'm lost in my way Too late I'm lost in your possession Possession, calculated, makes me want you more, alright Possession of calculated, calculated response on your confidence, tries to outweigh you Brave, are you really gonna go down the line? Brave, you know you want to go down the line Brave, you know you want to fuck on my mind I'm now lost in your royal view of your existence and life Brave, go down the line Brave, I'm glad I told you it's your own Designed all in line You're mine Go down that bitch, go down the line Brave, you're gonna come and fuck in my mind Brave, you're gonna say you want this And brave, you're gonna control it till you can't Walk a line Walk in my mind Watch your hand when I'm empty inside Brave You're brave You're a slave You're a slave Thanks for watching! Subscribe for more! Thanks for watching! Thanks for watching! Thanks for watching! Thanks for watching!
